data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user interface by limiting choices to streamline decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Navigation and options are reduced to enhance speed of use.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizing the size and position of interactive elements to ensure efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Frequently used actions are larger and strategically placed.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information is chunked into groups to improve user memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Messages and contacts grouped logically in the UI.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Adherence to familiar user interface design to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Layouts and icons follow standard app design practices.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items to simplify cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Chat elements are spatially grouped to convey relevance.
